title: The Dog with a Tiger Coat

pages.text: One day, a dog entered a village headman's house in search of food.
No food was available. The dog looked around and saw a tiger skin hanging on a wall.
It thought for a moment and slowly stole the tiger skin.
It ran toward a shaded spot and wore the tiger skin like a coat.
As the dog walked along the road, it noticed that all the other animals were fleeing in fear.
It started chasing the other animals and made fun of their terror.
The village headman saw the "tiger" and started shooting at it.
Luckily, the bullet pierced a nearby tree. The dog barked loudly at the headman to show that it was not a tiger.
The village headman caught the dog and removed the tiger skin.
The dog ran away and thought, "What a great escape! From now on, I must not cheat others. I learned a good lesson today."

moral: Honesty is always the best choice. Pretending to be someone else or cheating others will eventually lead to trouble.
